sessionStart.description: Retrieves relevant context from Recalium when a new session starts

userPromptSubmit.description: Injects relevant memory based on the user's prompt

sessionEnd.description: Archives the finished session transcript into Recalium (runs in background)

notes.installation: Copy the 'hooks' section above into your .claude/settings.json file (create if missing). Adjust paths if your Recalium repo is not at workspace root.
notes.environment_variables: RECALIUM_URL defaults to http://localhost:8000. RECALIUM_TOKEN is optional (for bearer auth). RECALIUM_TIMEOUT_S is optional (defaults to 5 seconds).
notes.alternativeSetup: You can also set these env vars globally in your shell or OS environment instead of in the hooks section.
notes.recaliumStack: Ensure 'docker compose up' is running in the Recalium root directory before starting a Claude Code session.
